title: web replay shell over M3 engine (was jssm#819)
manager: A browser shell that replays a recorded run on top of the M3 engine — step forward and back through a machine's history in the page. Replay is how you understand what a machine actually did on a specific run; putting it in the browser makes post-mortem debugging something you do in a shareable link, not a local tool.
cs: rides the M3 record/replay engine landed on v6
